# INIntentError.Code.invalidUserVocabularyFileLocation

**Case**

An invalid location was specified for the user vocabulary file.

## Declaration

```swift
case invalidUserVocabularyFileLocation
```

## Other Errors

- **INIntentError.Code.requestTimedOut**: The underlying request timed out.
- **INIntentError.Code.missingInformation**
